description: Task 4.4 FPOD raw data processing: data.che files processed into FP1 and FP3 files using the company open software FPOD.exe, then exported to txt files and uploaded to lifewatch.be/etn portal under the 'UnderwaterAcoustic' component. The output files contain acoustic presence/absence per minute and are openly available on https://rshiny.vsc.lifewatch.be/cpod-data/. Download of data is possible after registration.
name: T4.4 FPOD raw data
